global.title: Platform v3 is live!
global.message: Faster search, redesigned service pages, and one-click scaffolding.

pages.title: Discover your services
pages.message: Browse all 200+ registered components. Register yours in 2 minutes.
pages.emptyStateMessage: Your catalog is empty. Start by registering your first component.

pages.title: TechDocs — your knowledge hub
pages.message: All engineering docs live here. Add mkdocs.yml to any repo and they appear automatically.
pages.emptyStateMessage: Add a docs/ folder and mkdocs.yml to your repo — they'll appear here automatically.

pages.title: API catalogue
pages.message: All internal and external APIs in one place. Click any entry for full specs.
pages.emptyStateMessage: Register an API kind entity in your catalog-info.yaml to see it here.

pages.title: Stay in the loop
pages.message: Notifications from CI, deployments, and alerts appear here in real time.
pages.emptyStateMessage: No notifications right now. They'll appear here when your pipelines or services need attention.
